candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to the explicit total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets; not ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported current-assets total.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Semantically similar, but appears blank in preview while a cleaner exact line exists.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement disclosure, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning balance from cash flow statement, not the balance-sheet cash line.

candidates.row_label: Changes in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Change in cash, not the stock of cash.
Taxes paid, unrelated to CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet line rather than cash-flow rollforward lines.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current liabilities; directly matches LCT.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities; not LCT.
Represents current maturities of long-term debt; matches short-term debt/current portion of LT debt and excludes lease liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Would be the best total if populated, but preview shows blanks/nan.

candidates.row_label: Total Short Term Debt - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not a reported debt line.

final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
Bond and Loans from financial institutions

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the non-lease current debt maturity line. Did not include 'Capital Leases Mat within 1 Year' because lease liabilities are excluded from STD. Also avoided adding other borrowing lines that could double count with this maturity line.

candidates.why: Direct current tax liability/payable label on the balance sheet; best match for TXP.

candidates.row_label: Tax liabilities based on the taxable income for the period
candidates.why: Also tax-payable related, but preview is blank and 'Income Tax Liability' is cleaner.

variables.notes: No shortlist was provided for TXP; selected the explicit balance-sheet current tax liability label.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet total/net PPE-style line under IFRS; preferable to individual components or lease-specific rows.
Only a component of PPE, not the total.
Lease-specific gross PPE component, not preferred baseline total.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr PPE under Capital Lease
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation line, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation line, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Gain from divestment of tangible assets
candidates.why: Cash-flow gain/loss line, not balance-sheet PPE.

variables.notes: Used the reported total tangible-assets line as the closest PPE total/net measure.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches AT.
Accumulated amortization line, unrelated to total assets.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities (A)
candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement; directly matches OANCF.
